title: Content-scale demo: admitted campaign
description: Three distinct, solvable grid-puzzle levels generated through the front door; the admitted set for the demo.

gridPuzzles.title: Demo admit 1
gridPuzzles.description: Push one crate up-left onto the target.

gridPuzzles.title: Demo admit 2
gridPuzzles.description: Mirror layout: push one crate up-right onto the target.

gridPuzzles.title: Demo admit 3
gridPuzzles.description: Vertical push: one crate straight up onto the target.
